narcan 0.3.0

Flag suicide by other (not poison, fall, firearm, suffocation)

Source: R/flag_suicide_types.R
flag_suicide_other.Rd

ICD-10 codes: U03, X71, X75-X79, X81-X84, Y870. ICD-10 only (see flag_suicide_types). Warns if an explicit pre-1999 `year` is supplied.

Usage

flag_suicide_other(df, year = NULL)

Arguments

df

a processed MCOD dataframe

year

optional; warns if explicitly < 1999

Value

dataframe

Examples

df <- data.frame(ucod = c("X78", "X83", "X72"))
flag_suicide_other(df)
#>   ucod suicide_other
#> 1  X78             1
#> 2  X83             1
#> 3  X72             0
